notes: Robust modern update adopted after constrained search: validation improved while train Log Loss stayed essentially flat.
FIFA is now a moderate supporting signal in the modern-era fit, but Elo remains the main baseline strength feature.
Rolling draw tendency improved validation Log Loss and Brier Score.
Odds are blended as a pre-match market correction when available, not fitted from historical odds yet.
Previous conservative default was elo-fifa-tendency-conservative-2026-05-19 with validation Log Loss 0.876161.
